creator: sven.a.jonsson@bahnhof.se
text:
Created attachment 241364
Short log from install of ccache4

I have been using ccache4 with poudriere and have seen performance improvements.
Using ccache -s I have seen that the cache have been used.
After I updated to 13.2 (RC5, RC6 and now RELEASE) I don't see any activity in the cache anymore (ccache -s don't update the date).
When reinstalling ccache4 I don't see the symlinks I expect to see (see the attached ccacheinfo file). The same happens when I install ccache.
